overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy night walk through a neon-lit urban downtown. The camera moves beneath elevated highways and through intersections, featuring wet reflective streets, digital billboards, and industrial architecture with a cinematic cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with commercial billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway, passing illuminated billboards on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass spanning the entire road width overhead
tall structure with multiple glowing advertisement screens showing colorful content
low concrete wall separating the road lanes
tall poles with bright yellow-orange illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway in a foggy cyberpunk city. The wet asphalt reflects the yellow street lights and colorful digital billboards that line the right side of the road. The environment is sheltered from the weather by the overpass above, with no pedestrians visible and only sparse traffic in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with industrial district view

events.description: executes a sharp left turn at the intersection onto a new street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and proceeding along the new street lined with industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: dark sedan parked along the curb near the yield sign

entered.detail: large concrete industrial structure with glowing red signage on the facade
tall chimneys with orange warning lights against the night sky
red and white triangular traffic sign on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: The camera executes a sharp left turn at an intersection, transitioning from the covered underpass to a more open street with industrial architecture. Large concrete buildings with glowing red accents and tall smokestacks dominate the left side, while the elevated highway recedes into the right background. A parked sedan sits near a yield sign as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with street furniture

events.description: transitions from road to sidewalk beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the tiled sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: orange-brown concrete pavement tiles running parallel to the road
black metal bars separating the sidewalk from the street
massive concrete columns holding up the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a tiled sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, with massive concrete support pillars lining the left side. The camera moves forward under the shelter of the overpass, passing street lights and metal safety railings that separate the walkway from the sparse traffic. The industrial buildings fade behind as the path continues under the highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and commercial signage

events.description: crossing the street at the MLK Blvd intersection crosswalk
entering covered walkway area with digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at the crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk past commercial signs

notable_agents.action: car driving through the intersection in the opposite direction

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
green street sign reading MLK Blvd mounted on a pole
vertical digital display showing animated advertisements
covered waiting area with glass panels and seating

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an intersection marked by a crosswalk and MLK Blvd street sign, crossing the road while a car passes in the distance. After crossing, the scene transitions to a covered walkway area featuring a bus stop shelter and vertical digital advertising screens. The elevated highway continues overhead but recedes into the distance as the path continues through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy urban corridor that shifts from the shelter of a massive overpass to an open industrial intersection and back beneath the highway's concrete canopy. It begins by walking along wet asphalt beneath an elevated highway, where yellow street lights and colorful digital billboards reflect off the damp ground. As the camera executes a sharp left turn at an intersection, the scene opens up to reveal towering industrial buildings with glowing red accents and smokestacks before the highway recedes into the background. The perspective then shifts back onto a tiled sidewalk, moving past massive concrete support pillars and metal safety railings that line the sheltered walkway. Finally, the camera crosses a road at the MLK Blvd intersection, passing a distant car before entering a covered area featuring a bus stop and vertical advertising screens.
